element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Used against aerial enemies throughout all levels
Used against ground-based enemies and space stations throughout all levels
Upgrades available throughout levels for more powerful weapons
Progressive waves of enemies throughout each level
Multiple space stations must be defended in each level
Mandatory boss fight at end of each level; defeat required to progress

typical_tension_triggers: Approach to space station under threat
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based escalation with periodic relief between enemy formations; punctuated by mandatory boss battles at level endpoints

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of dual weapon system (air/ground) with manageable enemy waves
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing complexity with more simultaneous enemies and space station defense scenarios
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at end of each level reset player weapon loadout on death, requiring re-collection of power-ups

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level features sequential waves of enemies that must be cleared before advancing; waves appear to increase in density/difficulty
Segregation of air-to-air (laser) and air-to-ground (missile) weapons requires player to switch tactics based on enemy type
Multiple space stations appear throughout levels as objectives requiring protection from enemy assault
Each level ends with a boss encounter; defeat is required to progress; death causes full weapon loss, forcing re-upgrade
